description.ko: 첨단 기술과 거칠고 네온으로 물든 분위기가 어우러진 미래 도시의 몰입감 넘치는 시각화입니다. 이 장면은 거대 건축물의 그림자 아래 살아가는 하이테크 사회의 정수를 담고 있습니다.
description.en: An immersive visualization of a futuristic urban landscape where advanced technology meets a gritty, neon-drenched atmosphere. This scene captures the essence of a high-tech society living in the shadows of monolithic architecture.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk city at night, rain-slicked asphalt reflecting vibrant neon signs in magenta and electric blue, massive 3D holographic advertisements flickering above towering megastructures, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban canyons, high-tech low-life aesthetic, hyper-detailed, 8k resolution, volumetric fog, synthwave atmosphere.
